summary: Agent Jane discussed the Q3 pricing proposal with the procurement lead at Acme Corp. The client expressed interest in the enterprise plan but requested a 30-day pilot period before committing to an annual contract. Budget approval is pending CFO sign-off next Tuesday.
action_items: Send updated enterprise pricing PDF with volume discount by Friday EOD
Schedule technical demo with Acme's IT team next Wednesday at 2pm
Follow up with CFO approval status the following Monday
